title: Command Cockpit Minigame Sigil
summary: Added a compact animated minigame sigil to the Command Cockpit current-run hero so each selected path exposes a lane-specific game-module identity without adding scroll height.
changes: Derives sigil initials and module title from lane minigame metadata with fallback support for future lanes.
Adds orbit and glint motion inside a fixed-size hero slot to improve game feel without expanding the first viewport.
Adds responsive mobile styling that keeps the module identity visible while hiding tiny metadata on narrow screens.
